title: Tickflow graph scheduler should respect cross-epic blockers
description: The MVP /tickflow-run uses tk graph <epic> --json. Current graph output does not show external blockers such as qeb blocked_by=12i outside the vmv epic, so a scheduler relying only on graph waves may run a tick before a cross-epic dependency is closed. Update tickflow scheduling to re-check each candidate tick with tk show/tk ready semantics before launch, or update tk graph to include external blockers.
acceptance_criteria: A tick with blocked_by pointing to a task outside its parent epic is not launched by tickflow until the external blocker is closed; behavior is covered by test or documented scheduler guard.
closed_reason: Added authoritative readiness guard to Tickflow scheduler: before launch, each graph candidate is reloaded with tk show, awaiting/closed state is checked, and all blocked_by dependencies including external epic blockers must be closed; dry-run reports skipped blockers.
